<?php namespace Illuminate\Hashing; abstract class AbstractHasher { /** * Get information about the given hashed value. * * @param string $hashedValue * @return array */ public function info($hashedValue) { return password_get_info($hashedValue); } /** * Check the given plain value against a hash. * * @param string $value * @param string $hashedValue * @param array $options * @return bool */ public function check(#[\SensitiveParameter] $value, $hashedValue, array $options = []) { if (is_null($hashedValue) || strlen($hashedValue) === 0) { return false; } return password_verify($value, $hashedValue); } }
